item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Downward Pressure Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The BSE Smallcap index has experienced a notable decline in recent sessions, reflecting broader market headwinds and sector-specific challenges. Despite pockets of strong performance, the segment's overall trend points to underperformance against larger benchmarks, with breadth indicators signalling a cautious investor sentiment. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Faces Broad Sell-Off as BSE Midcap Index Declines 1.04%
item.description: The BSE Midcap index experienced a modest decline of 1.04% on 3 March 2026, continuing a subdued trend over the past week with a 0.2% drop. Despite this, select stocks within the segment delivered notable returns, highlighting a mixed performance across sectors and stocks. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Slips Amid Broad Market Weakness; Defensive Stocks Show Resilience
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced a notable downturn this week, with a cumulative decline of 2.06% over the past five trading sessions. Despite pockets of resilience, the majority of heavyweight stocks have succumbed to selling pressure, reflecting a cautious market mood amid mixed economic signals and sectoral rotations. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Broad Sell-Off Amid Defensive Sector Strength
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced notable weakness in recent sessions, declining 1.31% on the day and 2.06% over the past five trading days. Despite this broad downturn, select heavyweight stocks have bucked the trend, while defensive sectors have outperformed cyclical counterparts amid ongoing market volatility. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Faces Broad-Based Decline Amid Weak Market Sentiment
item.description: The BSE Midcap index experienced a modest decline of 1.04% on 3 March 2026, reflecting a cautious market mood as broader economic concerns weighed on investor sentiment. Over the past five trading sessions, the mid-cap segment has slipped by 0.2%, signalling a period of consolidation after recent gains. Despite the overall downturn, select stocks within the segment delivered notable performances, underscoring the varied dynamics at play. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Downward Pressure Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The small-cap segment, as measured by the BSE Smallcap index, has experienced a notable decline over recent sessions, underperforming broader benchmarks amid uneven sectoral performances and weak market breadth. Despite pockets of strong individual stock returns, the overall trend reflects investor caution and selective risk aversion in this volatile market segment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Thrive Future Habitats Limited is Rated Sell
